description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python that runs on push and pull requests to master and main branches when specific files like pyproject.toml, setup.cfg, Python files, or workflow YAML files change. The workflow checks if any of these files have changed, and if not, skips tests. If changes are detected, it sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs checks with tox, and then runs tests in parallel across multiple Python versions and operating systems.
